description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:3.5 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apk, installs openssl, downloads Hugo v0.18.1 tar.gz, verifies its MD5 checksum, extracts the binary, moves it to /usr/bin, and prints the Hugo version. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes `cd site`, `hugo`, and `mv ./public ../public`, and publishes the resulting public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a test job that runs on all branches except master, executes `cd site` and `hugo` to verify site generation. No services, caches, or additional stages are defined.
